2026-05-13.patch_summary: This patch adds a KUnit test suite for the augmented-rbtree IOVA allocator. The test suite includes various test cases to verify the correctness of the allocator, including domain lifecycle, allocation and deallocation, alignment, and invariant checks. The tests are designed to catch any sequencing bugs in the insert, erase, rotate, and propagate operations. The patch also adds a helper function to verify invariants during and after each test run.

reviews.author: Jason Gunthorpe
reviews.summary:
The reviewer requested the addition of a .kunitconfig file to run the KUnit tests, and warned about potential issues with test cases written by Claude.

reviewer noted that the current implementation of iova_test_init_ctx()/iova_test_cleanup() is not suitable for KUnit testing, suggesting instead to use a fixture and remove these functions from each test

reviewer suggested removing the #ifdef directive, implying it is unnecessary
reviews.raw_body:
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

Heh, you should still read the patches when using claude :)

Can you add a .kunitconfig please? The tests should run with a command like:

    tools/testing/kunit/kunit.py run --build_dir build_kunit_x86_64 --arch x86_64 --kunitconfig ./drivers/iommu/.kunitconfig

Also it is worth while to carefully read each test because claude will
happily write nonsense tests that avoid actual bugs so they succeed...

---

This iova_test_init_ctx()/iova_test_cleanup() stuff is not the right
way to use kunit. Add a fixture and remove it from every test.

---

Don't really need this #ifdef

Jason

reviews.author: Rik Riel (author)
reviews.summary:
Author acknowledged a mistake in their previous patch and promised to fix it, but did not provide any details on the specific issue or how they plan to address it.

Author acknowledges that further work is needed and promises to address reviewer feedback in a revised version (v2) of the patch, which they plan to complete within a week or two.
reviews.raw_body:
I saw it. Then I got distracted by something else,
and forgot to fix it :/

---

I'll address your comments, and also the issues
found by Sashiko. I'll try to get v2 ready within
a week or two.

-- 
All Rights Reversed.

2026-05-15.patch_summary: This patch adds a KUnit test suite for the augmented-rbtree IOVA allocator. The test suite includes various test cases to verify the correctness of the allocator, including domain lifecycle, allocation and deallocation, alignment, and invariant checking. The tests are designed to catch any sequencing bugs in the insert, erase, rotate, and propagate operations. The patch also adds a helper function to verify the invariants of the IOVA tree.
